NotFound.Title: Page not found
NotFound.Description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or deleted.

Suggestion.CheckUrl: Double check the URL for typos
Suggestion.Menu: Use the navigation menu to find what you need

Global.Title: Something went wrong
Global.Description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or reload the page.
Global.NetworkError: Network connection lost. Please check your internet.
Global.TimeoutError: The request timed out. Please try again.
Global.UnauthorizedError: You do not have permission to access that resource.
Global.NullError: The application encountered missing data. Please refresh.
